description: Applies an expression for each row of a table. This pipeline starts with '170ff0ed-2c3a-45c1-bcd1-441bb1d6dae5' node, which represents the input data, then it is processed by '6feb136d-815f-4d33-a53c-cff76abff0db' node to apply the expression, finally ending at 'fe9083bc-7514-46fc-886a-2340f25fadca' node.

6feb136d-815f-4d33-a53c-cff76abff0db.name: iji-export-table-v2
6feb136d-815f-4d33-a53c-cff76abff0db.description:
Exports a results table to CSV/XLSX

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

170ff0ed-2c3a-45c1-bcd1-441bb1d6dae5.name: table-apply-expression-per-row-v2
170ff0ed-2c3a-45c1-bcd1-441bb1d6dae5.description: Applies an expression for each row. The column values are available as variables.
